items.title: Caterpillar (CAT) Registers a Bigger Fall Than the Market: Important Facts to Note
items.description: Caterpillar (CAT) closed at $589.76 in the latest trading session, marking a -1.36% move from the prior day.

items.title: Jamie Engstrom joins Ameren board of directors
items.description: Ameren Corporation (NYSE: AEE) announced today that Jamie L. Engstrom has been elected to the Ameren board of directors, effective Jan. 1, 2026.

items.title: Dow Jones Industrial Average's top-performing stocks of 2025
items.description: Ahead of the new year, Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a closer look at some of the Dow Jones Industrial Average's (^DJI) best performers in 2025: Caterpillar (CAT), Goldman Sachs (GS), Johnson & Johnson (JNJ), and IBM (IBM). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Morning Brief.

items.title: Build a Stronger 2026 Portfolio With These 5 Dividend Aristocrats
items.description: ATO, MDT, PEP, CAT and SPGI stand out as dividend aristocrats for 2026, offering decades of hikes, solid yields and defensive income.
